pending.body: In `src/adapters/worktree.rs:48-70` and `src/adapters/worktree.rs:138-140`, stop pinning `WorktreeAdapter` to the first hard-coded absolute git path before consulting `PATH`. On Linux/macOS this will usually select `/usr/bin/git`, which means any `PATH`-injected wrapper is silently ignored for every worktree operation. That is a correctness regression: the existing hard-rollback failure scenario in `src/contexts/conformance_spec/scenarios.rs:5894-5928` now no longer intercepts `git reset --hard`, and `target/debug/ralph-burning conformance run --filter SC-ROLLBACK-008` fails with `expected failure, got success`. Preserve ambient `PATH` resolution (or search `PATH` first with executable checks) so fake/custom git binaries still work.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 2 -> Plan and Implement
